item.title: analogy
item.description: I really like analogies because this is an entry point for general understanding before jumping into technicalities security-measure: analogy doesn’t give proof, analogy helps ...

item.title: Engineering Patterns
item.description: Patterns Here I collect patterns I come across daily practice. decorator / wrappers - decorated an AGI script with boilerplate circuit breaker - to prevent calls when API key of a downstream service changed round robin facade proxy factory sliding window off by one error marker interface .

item.title: Additonal education
item.description: English 2024 Organization: Maxim Technology education 2023-09-19 - 2024-03-28 Remote intermediate English. Joined an English group to maintain practice.

item.title: stacktraces-errors
item.description: This is an entity home for tagstacktrace-exception-error I collect stack traces and mark them withstacktrace-exception-error tag. I engaged in organizing a repository for collecting information about software errors.

item.title: Companies
item.description: Maxim technology 2023-08 – now() Full time Software Engineer at Telephony (PBX) department Activities: Voice order project English course Career Break 2022-10-01 – 2023-08-18 ...

item.title: Kopylov Ivan - backend Java / Kotlin developer
item.description: Summary Has an experience with CI / CD, DDD (ubiquitous language, bounded contexts) and with the majority of extreme programming artifacts. Experience in software life cycle (design, development, delivery, deployment, and support).

item.title: Projects
item.description: Voice order company: Maxim Technology Implemented from scratch to high-CCU production and became a maintainer of a backend microservice. The service enables taxi passengers order a taxi via giving commands as an answer to voice guidance.
